why: NEGT-001..008 measure negative affect (irritability, cynicism) — invalid for negotiation per Bias Strategy §4 and U12
was_wrong: Likert stems like 'I hold grudges longer than I should' fused to negotiation dimension
improved: Branching negotiation sim items + 2 anchor SJTs; construct NEG-SKILL

replacement.anti_bias: Behaviour in a real scope/deadline ask — not affect self-report
replacement.items_retired_redirect: v3.3-bank-negative-affect-pool (do not use in User 6 report)

anchor_sjts.stem: Stakeholder adds scope without extending deadline. Your first response:
options: Clarify priorities and what can move to phase 2

anchor_sjts.stem: Vendor quotes rush fee you cannot afford. Best next step:
options: Ask which scope reduction hits the same date

user_flow_patch.note: Sim carries primary weight; SJTs are anchors only
